sentences.arabic: يَعْتَبِرُ الْحُصُولُ عَلَى مِنْحَةٍ دِرَاسِيَّةٍ لِلْخَارِجِ فُرْصَةً ذَهَبِيَّةً لِتَغْيِيرِ مَجْرَى حَيَاةِ الطَّالِبِ.
sentences.translation: Dobijanje stipendije za studiranje u inostranstvu smatra se zlatnom prilikom za promjenu toka studentovog života.
sentences.translationEn: Obtaining a scholarship to study abroad is considered a golden opportunity to change the course of a student's life.

sentences.arabic: بِالرَّغْمِ مِنَ الصُّعُوبَاتِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ، يَتَعَلَّمُ الْمُبْتَعِثُ كَيْفِيَّةَ الِاعْتِمَادِ عَلَى النَّفْسِ فِي بِيئَةٍ غَرِيبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos kulturnim poteškoćama, stipendista uči kako se osloniti na sebe u tuđem okruženju.
sentences.translationEn: Despite cultural difficulties, the scholarship recipient learns how to be self-reliant in a foreign environment.

sentences.arabic: تُتِيحُ هَذِهِ التَّجْرِبَةُ لِلشَّبَابِ الِانْغِمَاسَ فِي لُغَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ وَتَوْسِيعَ مَدَارِكِهِمُ الْفِكْرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo iskustvo omogućava mladima da urone u nove jezike i prošire svoje intelektualne vidike.
sentences.translationEn: This experience allows young people to immerse themselves in new languages and broaden their intellectual horizons.

sentences.arabic: يَعُودُ الْخِرِّيجُونَ إِلَى أَوْطَانِهِمْ وَهُمْ يَحْمِلُونَ خِبْرَاتٍ عِلْمِيَّةً وَحَيَاتِيَّةً لَا تُقَدَّرُ بِثَمَنٍ.
sentences.translation: Diplomci se vraćaju u svoje domovine noseći naučna i životna iskustva koja su neprocjenjiva.
sentences.translationEn: Graduates return to their home countries carrying scientific and life experiences that are priceless.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّبَادُلَ الثَّقَافِيَّ يُسَاهِمُ فِي بِنَاءِ جُسُورِ التَّفَاهُمِ بَيْنَ الشُّعُوبِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kulturna razmjena doprinosi izgradnji mostova razumijevanja između različitih naroda.
sentences.translationEn: Cultural exchange contributes to building bridges of understanding between different peoples.
